title: TaskAssignedToChain payload
description: Emitted when a task moves between chains, or when its position within a chain changes. For initial assignment (the assignment that happens at create time), TaskCreated carries the same data — TaskAssignedToChain is for re-assignment after creation. Captures both from/to chain and from/to position so the ledger shows the move without needing the prior row state.

from_chain_slug.description: Chain the task is moving from. null is invalid for re-assignment (the task always had a chain — see TaskCreated.chain_slug); the field is nullable to leave room for a future 'orphan to chain' adoption flow if one is ever defined.

to_chain_slug.description: Chain the task is moving to. Required.
